# CTFontDescriptorGetTypeID()

**Function**

Returns the type identifier for Core Text font descriptor references.

## Declaration

```swift
func CTFontDescriptorGetTypeID() -> CFTypeID
```

## Return Value

The identifier for the [doc://com.apple.coretext/documentation/CoreText/CTFontDescriptor] opaque type.
